pi_items.source: O*NET / BLS taxonomy lookup for SOC code 29-9091.00
O*NET taxonomy matching the Athletic Trainer occupation role
Task instructions and verifier.py checks against manager_routine, manager_day, and manager_day_day tables

privileged_info_summary: Verified the occupation (Athletic Trainer), SOC code (29-9091.00), and industry (Healthcare Practitioners and Technical) against O*NET and BLS occupational taxonomies. Confirmed that the task purely tests the requested wger features ('routine_creation', 'training_day_creation', 'day_of_week_assignment', 'multi_routine_management') by reviewing the explicit requirements in the task description and the corresponding database queries in verifier.py and export_result.sh. The task involves purely synthetic generation of workout routines without relying on external datasets.
